text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the tryouts—a multitude of races highlighting
up-and-coming runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to be late, I make my way through the academy grounds,
heading straight for the track.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah! You there! Yes, you. Could you help me with a tiny little favor?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup. If anyone comes by asking questions, just tell them,
"Nature? Nope, haven't seen her!" and send them on their—

text_block_list.name: Friendly Woman
text_block_list.text: Ah, Natie! She's here—we finally found her!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
What, so you were here the whole time? You weren't at the track, so
we thought you mighta overslept or summat.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, just for the record, I'm not that laid-back. If anything, I've been getting up earlier and earlier lately.

text_block_list.name: Friendly Woman
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you should hear yourself, Natie! You sounded just like us old
folks there!

text_block_list.name: Friendly Woman
text_block_list.text:
More importantly—the tryouts! We're all here to cheer you on, so go
get 'em, Natie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um, I appreciate all of you coming out here... But don't get your
hopes up too much, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know my name makes me sound like a natural winner, but to be
honest, my talents really aren't all that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like, the best I placed in my scrimmages was third. And it's not like
I've got any grand ol' dreams either.

text_block_list.name: Friendly Man
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, don't say that. Well, we gotta get ready too. Make sure ya
warm those muscles up, Natie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... Yeah, 'preciate it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, so um, sorry about that. Totally left you hanging there.
choice_data_list:
Were those people part of your fan club or
something?

Were those people part of your fan club or
something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's nothing like that. They're just some folks from the local
shopping district who're here to support me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I can't really live up to their expectations, so I wanted to
avoid them if I could.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: By the way... Hm? That badge on your collar...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you a trainer here?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really?! Yikes, then I totally flubbed my elevator pitch! Even if I did say nothing but the gospel truth...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um, haha... Hey, the name's Nature. I'm running in today's tryouts, so
guess you'll be seeing me kinda...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Anyways, catcha 'round.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strangely cynical Nice Nature promptly dashes away in the
direction of the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, the tryouts begin!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... All right, first place!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: S-simply immaculate! Such beautiful and refined running, Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the rumors about her being the second coming of Symboli
Rudolf were true! Teio, please let me scout you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Now, now, wait your turn! Line up before me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the races go on, promising racers are scouted one after another by
the watching trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Man, that's Teio for you. Always stealing the show...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's got the talent, the skill, and the looks. And on top of that, she's
got her big dream of following in Rudolf's footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Man, she radiates main character vibes. We might as well be living in
different worlds.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Girls like her... really are something else.

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Official A
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature! Please get ready for your race!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right, roger that. Well, time for my turn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Friendly Supporters
text_block_list.text: Natieeeee! Yeah, just like that! You go, Natieee!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're rounding the fourth turn and entering the final stretch! Can
our front-runner maintain her position?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But look at who's giving chase—it's Nice Nature! Nice Nature has
closed the gap in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My eyes are glued to her amazing running form. What a clean rush in
the final spurt!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Aaand—it's too little, too late! Nice Nature, finishing in third place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew. Well, that's just how it goes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Even when I go all-out... third's all I get.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her results might've been unfortunate, but her running back there was
picture-perfect. Now's my chance!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... Ah. Someone's a bit of a ditz, huh? Teio's line is thataway,
'kay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: H-huuuuuh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But like, um... Oh, I'm not saying no, okay? If anything, thanks for
picking me and all that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just, well... You sure you want me? I guess if you get fed up with
me... just tell me, all right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still, until then... At least for now... I-I'm in your hands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I excitedly shake the hand of a nonplussed Nice Nature, sealing the
deal as her new trainer.
